## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss project handoff strategy and deliverables for StackBlitz template generation project.](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [StackBlitz prefers subdirectory implementation (/templates/) on main domain for SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Project to wrap up in \~4 weeks; focus on handoff-ready deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Need to migrate from V0 to Bolt for internal StackBlitz approval](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Clarification needed on final deliverables; Marcel to provide detailed list](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)

## Topics

### Implementation Strategy

  - [Three potential paths discussed:](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
    1.  Speed-optimized proof of concept
    2.  Subdomain implementation (bolt-like instance)
    3.  Subdirectory implementation (preferred)
  - [StackBlitz favors subdirectory (/templates/) on main domain for SEO](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Importance of making community content highly visible (cf. VZero, Lovable)](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)

### Project Timeline and Expectations

  - [\~4 week timeframe for project completion](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Focus on creating handoff-ready deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [StackBlitz team not likely open to continuing partnership long-term](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Need for clear, itemized list of deliverables from GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [Current demo built with V0, not Bolt (StackBlitz's product)](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Internal StackBlitz team sensitive to use of non-Bolt tools](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [GrowthX to migrate/rebuild demo using Bolt for better reception](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Mitchell open to V0 if it expedites process; prioritizes having a workable repo](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)

### Value Proposition and Insights

  - [GrowthX provided valuable insights through research and data analysis](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Identified website templates (esp. niche types) as high-potential use case](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Example: "notary website templates" - 1,800 monthly searches, keyword difficulty of 8](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Millions of long-tail searches for various website template categories](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [Strategy involves scaling to thousands of high-quality templates](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Proposed workflow: Start with best-practice frontend repo, adapt for different use cases](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Deliverables Discussion

  - [Repo with Bolt-like experience, implementable in subdirectory](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Details on overall data model for pages](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [Sample pages with example websites](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Sample prompts for generation](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Potentially transferable Supabase instance](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Comprehensive strategy for scaling template generation](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to compile and send detailed list of project deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [GrowthX to migrate demo from V0 to Bolt](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Finalize handoff strategy and materials over next 3-4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [StackBlitz to review deliverables list and confirm expectations](https://fathom.video/share/1WzGLYiRiAjTqe9eBBVVkRq_9Y_fM9LV?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
